queries.question: Show all stockbrokers and mutual funds with 1% fees.
queries.sql:
SELECT Stockbrokers.name
FROM Stockbrokers
WHERE Stockbrokers.fees = "1%"
UNION
SELECT Mutual_funds.fund_name as name
FROM Mutual_funds
WHERE Mutual_funds.fees = "1%"
